accessToken.title: Mesibo Access Token
accessToken.description: Your Mesibo user access token from the Mesibo console (console.mesibo.com).

authorizedUsers.title: Authorized Users
authorizedUsers.description: Comma-separated list of Mesibo addresses allowed to send messages to this bot. Leave empty to allow all users.

dmPolicy.title: DM Security Policy
dmPolicy.description: Who can send OpenClaw messages via this channel.

allowFrom.title: Allowed Senders
allowFrom.description: List of Mesibo addresses allowed to message OpenClaw (used when dmPolicy is 'allowlist').
